response.justification: Candidate is a capable senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows), but the role demands a Director-level individual contributor with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. The resume shows roughly 11 years of professional experience post-2014, no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, no advanced degree in an AI field, and no evidence of advising strategic customers or operating at principal/director IC altitude. Title and scope are a significant mismatch.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack background across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud (TypeScript, Node, D, AWS)
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic developer tooling
Founder of an open-source geospatial platform and active community contributor (talks, workshops, OSS libraries)
concerns: Experience level is closer to senior/staff IC; no evidence of Principal/Director-level scope, influencing org-wide strategy, or external thought leadership in AI
No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or research credentials — preferred Master's/PhD in AI absent and AI work appears recent and peripheral
Tenure totals fall short of the 15-year bar for the role, and there is no track record of advising strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption

key_factors.factor: Seniority and scope mismatch vs. Principal/Director IC bar
Lack of recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products at scale
Recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work
